description: This pipeline performs image processing and analysis, starting with input images that undergo various transformations, including filtering, thresholding, and dimension adjustments. The processed images are then used for spot detection, tracking, and measurement, generating statistics and results tables. Additionally, ROI extraction and masking are applied to further refine the analysis, ultimately producing output data that includes track measures, particle properties, and annotated results.

64223f59-d13b-4ecd-93e9-d54f9a94ab4d.name: ij1-transform-equalize-dimensions
64223f59-d13b-4ecd-93e9-d54f9a94ab4d.description:
Makes the input image have the same dimensions as the reference image. You can choose to make them equal in width/height, and hyperstack dimensions (Z, C, T)

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

82792992-a40c-4313-9bc4-313de2321c73.name: annotate-with-data
82792992-a40c-4313-9bc4-313de2321c73.description:
Annotates the incoming data with the other data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

c4e266e4-212e-4655-9a7f-7435014d5cfe.name: trackmate-measure-tracks
c4e266e4-212e-4655-9a7f-7435014d5cfe.description: Measures the tracks and outputs the results into a table

18f46259-dc29-4136-8761-b856368101c0.name: external-imagej-macro
18f46259-dc29-4136-8761-b856368101c0.description:
Runs a custom ImageJ macro. JIPipe will iterate through the iteration steps and execute operations to convert JIPipe data into their ImageJ equivalent (see JIPipe to ImageJ parameter). Then the macro code is executed, followed by operations to import the result data into JIPipe data (see ImageJ to JIPipe parameter). Please feel free to click the 'Load example' button in the parameters to get started.

Please keep in mind the following remarks:

  • Input images are opened as windows named according to the input slot. You have to select windows with the select() function or comparable functions.
  • Output images are extracted by finding a window that is named according to the output slot. Ensure to rename() windows accordingly.
  • To extract the 'Results' table output, add an output of type 'Results table' and set the name to 'Results'. Alternatively, you can configure the output in 'JIPipe to ImageJ' and override the name to 'Results'
  • To import other tables, use a different slot name or set the appropriate configuration.
  • Please note that there is only one ROI manager. This is a restriction of ImageJ.
  • Annotations can also be accessed via a function getJIPipeAnnotation(key), which returns the string value of the annotation or an empty string if no value was set.
  • You can define variables that are passed from JIPipe to ImageJ. Variables are also created for incoming path-like data, named according to the slot name.


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

7f9e0a17-6a1c-4404-b0b0-581ad44b6b8e.name: trackmate-detector
7f9e0a17-6a1c-4404-b0b0-581ad44b6b8e.description:
Detect spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

ab2f0fd4-8aef-4046-841a-5b4c04f159df.name: ij1-dimensions-zproject-2
ab2f0fd4-8aef-4046-841a-5b4c04f159df.description: Performs a Z-Projection. Also supports other axes C-Project/T-Project.

18936894-d7f4-4f44-8569-05011d52272f.name: trackmate-tracks-to-roi
18936894-d7f4-4f44-8569-05011d52272f.description: Converts TrackMate tracks into ROI lists. Each lists contains the spot ROI of one track.

19525bd8-8a31-4b4c-a4e7-78ca8b38a9d6.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
19525bd8-8a31-4b4c-a4e7-78ca8b38a9d6.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

b3cc4464-f9b4-4073-8efe-604fc87db162.name: ij1-roi-to-mask
b3cc4464-f9b4-4073-8efe-604fc87db162.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

4d047cbf-68fb-4178-80d2-cd125e24e390.name: ij1-contrast-illumination-correction2d
4d047cbf-68fb-4178-80d2-cd125e24e390.description: Applies a Gaussian filter to the image and extracts the maximum value. Pixel values are then divided by this value.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

a5241596-a4e0-47e0-a31b-22dfc4b976e9.name: trackmate-tracking
a5241596-a4e0-47e0-a31b-22dfc4b976e9.description:
Track spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

ba49283b-0243-4f2e-a0ac-ad69149c718f.name: ij1-analyze-find-particles2d
ba49283b-0243-4f2e-a0ac-ad69149c718f.description: Converts mask images into ROI by applying a connected components algorithm and generates measurements. Please note that this algorithm will always trace the external object boundaries and convert them into polygonal ROIs. This means that holes will be closed. This node requires a thresholded image as input and will extract measurements from the thresholded image. If you already have ROI available and want measurements, use 'Extract ROI statistics'.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

1227d0d1-d2c5-4090-94b6-3781c9caa707.name: ij1-math-fast-image-arithmetics
1227d0d1-d2c5-4090-94b6-3781c9caa707.description:
Applies standard arithmetic and logical operations including, addition, subtraction, division, multiplication, GAMMA, EXP, LOG, SQR, SQRT, ABS, AND, OR, XOR, minimum, maximum, and more.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6f1a101a-e44d-4ef1-b60c-41f52126dcbd.name: trackmate-create-spot-detector-mask-detector
6f1a101a-e44d-4ef1-b60c-41f52126dcbd.description:
This detector creates spots from a black and white mask.

More precisely, all the pixels in the designated channel that have a value strictly larger than 0 are considered as part of the foreground, and used to build connected regions. In 2D, spots are created with the (possibly simplified) contour of the region. In 3D, a spherical spot is created for each region in its center, with a volume equal to the region volume.

The spot quality stores the object area or volume in pixels.

6bc774cc-25b4-45c5-a35b-b45a98864ced.name: ij1-contrast-illumination-correction2d
6bc774cc-25b4-45c5-a35b-b45a98864ced.description: Applies a Gaussian filter to the image and extracts the maximum value. Pixel values are then divided by this value.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

0756c04c-a9e9-41fe-947b-867368424a72.name: ij1-roi-statistics
0756c04c-a9e9-41fe-947b-867368424a72.description:
Generates a results table containing ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, an empty reference image is automatically generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

eef6b307-271f-4128-9d07-ce822cb7988a.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
eef6b307-271f-4128-9d07-ce822cb7988a.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
